IRANIAN RIAL PARALLEL RATE 1,531,500 IRR/USD TUESDAY (Alanchand) — mild ~1% rial strengthening vs Monday's 1,546,500. 2,000,000 hyperinflation trigger unbreached; trajectory to 2M slightly flattened from earlier 'early-May' framing.

MOJTABA KHAMENEI RESPONSE EXPECTED WEDNESDAY [REPORTED, Axios exclusive sourcing]. Axios/Fortune Tuesday: US and Pakistani mediators specifically waiting for Mojtaba's response; Iranian negotiators waiting 'for a green light from the supreme leader.' CNN April 21 analysis and Time both note public absence is structural feature. A substantive Wednesday statement (IRNA-carried written or video/audio) is the next forcing function.

ABSORPTION THESIS FALSIFIED AT 96-HOUR MARK BY CONFIRMED IRGC KINETIC INSIDE CEASEFIRE ENVELOPE [CONFIRMED ACTION — UKMTO + IRGC self-claim + MarineTraffic AIS + multi-wire]. Within ~12 hours of Trump's Tuesday-evening 'indefinite' ceasefire extension, IRGC Navy fast-boats fired without prior radio warning on a container ship 15nm NE of Oman (heavy bridge damage, all crew safe per UKMTO) and on a second outbound cargo vessel 8nm west of Iran (vessel stopped, crew safe). IRGC Navy formally claimed via Tasnim the seizure of two named container ships — MSC Francesca (Mediterranean Shipping Company-flagged 11,660-TEU) and Epaminondas (Liberian-flagged, Greek-headquartered manager Technomar Shipping; IMO 9153862) — both transferred to Iranian territorial waters under 'manipulating navigation systems' / 'attempting to secretly exit the Strait' framing. AIS tracking shows both vessels stationary off the Iranian port of Sirik post-seizure (Seatrade Maritime / VesselFinder — tracker-level operational confirmation). Sadjadpour's 72-hour test technically passed Tuesday 23:59 IST without US-flagged kinetic — but the framework's claim of strategic restraint is FALSIFIED by the 96-hour kinetic against COMMERCIAL shipping inside the ceasefire envelope. Vaez's 'capability is banked, not discharged' framework is now the better analytical anchor. The doctrinal read: Iran is mirroring the US Touska/Tifani playbook — commercial-vessel interdiction within the ceasefire envelope, no military-on-military, but unmistakably a kinetic break before Mojtaba has even spoken. CENTCOM has NOT publicly responded to the IRGC seizures specifically (asymmetric to its loud Touska coverage) — possibly indicating the administration is choosing not to escalate publicly while the 3-5 day patience window runs.

AXIOS — TRUMP'S 'INDEFINITE' EXTENSION IS IN PRIVATE A 3-5 DAY WINDOW; 'IT IS NOT GOING TO BE OPEN-ENDED' [REPORTED — single Axios outlet, three US-officials sourcing; Axios has best Mojtaba/admin track record on this crisis]. Axios Wednesday: 'Trump is willing to give another three to five days of ceasefire to allow the Iranians to get their shit together' with explicit 'It is not going to be open-ended' qualifier. Materially reframes the Tuesday-evening Truth Social extension that mainstream press characterised as 'indefinite.' The window expires approximately Sunday April 26 IST. Trump separately reiterated on Truth Social Wednesday the '$500 million a day' framing (Iran losing through closed Hormuz revenue) and the 'merely want to save face' line on Iran's Hormuz-closure rhetoric — both consistent with maximum-pressure into deadline. Two analytical loads: (i) the imminent-strike option Trump publicly confirmed Tuesday with 'hold our Attack' language is loaded for re-activation Saturday-Monday; (ii) the IRGC's Wednesday morning kinetic is the worst possible Iranian opening move INSIDE that window — Vahidi camp signalling capability in exactly the period the US is testing for a unified Iranian proposal. Pakistan back-channel (Munir-Sharif-Dar-Araghchi) has 72-96 hours to engineer a deliverable. Treat as REPORTED-with-strong-confidence; do not upgrade to CONFIRMED until a second outlet (NYT, WaPo, CNN national security desk) corroborates the specific 3-5 day framing.
sources: Axios 'Trump gives Iran days to end power struggle'
Trump Truth Social Wednesday posts (Hormuz / $500M / save face)

signals.content: US OFFICIALS PUBLICLY NAME IRGC FACTIONAL ARCHITECTURE FOR FIRST TIME: VAHIDI+ZOLGHADR (HARDLINE) vs GHALIBAF+CIVILIANS (ENGAGEMENT) [REPORTED — Axios + multi-outlet partial corroboration]. Axios Wednesday on US-official sourcing names: hardliners = IRGC C-in-C Major General Ahmad Vahidi + SNSC Secretary Mohammad Bagher Zolghadr (favour conflict continuation); engagement camp = Majles Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf (former IRGC Aerospace commander, retains aerospace-branch ties, allied with Mojtaba's household) + civilian negotiators Pezeshkian, Araghchi. Vahidi reportedly the 'only one who meets the new Supreme Leader face-to-face' and 'practically controlling the country, blocking attempts of Pezeshkian to appoint a new intelligence minister.' Mojtaba reportedly dealing with serious injury preventing full role discharge. Three operational implications: (i) Mojtaba's silence is increasingly looking like incapacitation rather than tactical pause; (ii) the IRGC's Wednesday kinetic is consistent with Vahidi-camp dominance independent of Mojtaba's writ; (iii) Pakistan back-channel via Araghchi-Dar is structurally weak because the receiving Iranian voice (Araghchi/Pezeshkian) is the LOSING side of the IRGC fight. Conditional probability of a signable Iranian unified proposal inside the 3-5 day Trump window has fallen materially. The specific actors ARE confirmed across partial sources (PJ Media, Townhall, Time, CSMonitor, The Federal, Iran International); the operational interpretation ('Vahidi practically controlling') is the analytical synthesis. Vahidi node creation DEFERRED pending one additional CONFIRMED Iranian-state source (Tasnim photograph at SNSC, or state-TV interview).
sources: PJ Media 'Meet the New Iranian Power Behind the Throne'
Time 'Iran's Supreme Leader No Longer Reigns Supreme'
Townhall 'Iranian Supreme Leader Sidelined As Military Takes More Control'

signals.content: PEZESHKIAN 'WAR BENEFITS NO ONE' + 45-MIN PHONE CALL TO PAKISTAN PM SHARIF — CIVILIAN-ENGAGEMENT TRACK OPERATES IN PARALLEL (NOT IN COORDINATION) WITH IRGC KINETIC [CONFIRMED]. Wednesday Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian publicly said 'war benefits no one' and that 'every rational and diplomatic route should be used to reduce tensions while standing firm against threats.' He told Pakistan's PM in a 45-minute phone conversation that the US blockade in the Strait of Hormuz 'is a violation of the ceasefire agreement' — but framed in diplomatic register. This is the cleanest evidence Wednesday that Iran's two-track (IRGC kinetic + civilian engagement) architecture is OPERATIONAL, not theoretical: the same day the IRGC fires on a container ship and seizes two named vessels, the civilian president maintains a diplomatic posture and the FM (Araghchi) channel to Pakistan is open. The two-track is NOT coordinated; it reflects active factional contestation. Iran's Foreign Ministry separately labelled both Touska and Tifani US seizures 'piracy at sea and state terrorism' via state-TV spokesperson — operationally consistent with civilian-wing pattern (formal diplomatic protest while IRGC executes operational response). Russian and Chinese state media (TASS / Xinhua) relay the 'piracy' framing.

PEZESHKIAN PUBLICLY ACCUSES IRGC OF WRECKING THE CEASEFIRE — IRANIAN FACTIONAL SPLIT GOES OPEN AND LOUD [REPORTED]. Pezeshkian Wednesday online statement (operative Thursday) accused IRGC of undermining the ceasefire he and Araghchi negotiated through Pakistan mediation — implicitly naming Vahidi as the obstacle. House of Saud (Saudi-adjacent) carried under 'Pezeshkian Cannot Fire the Generals Wrecking the Ceasefire'; Iran International 'Rift deepens between Iran's president and Guards chief.' Euronews and Fox News carry 'IRGC sidelines president, blocks appointments.' Pezeshkian's Wednesday statement naming 'breach of commitments, blockade and threats' as three obstacles inverts IRGC's framing and places ceasefire-violation responsibility on US — but the fact Pezeshkian needs to say this publicly is itself the admission that IRGC domestic-critics are pressuring him. IRNA notably did NOT carry the Pezeshkian-accuses-IRGC framing — civilian government's most significant rhetorical move of crisis is being suppressed inside Iran's dominant information channel. Three operational consequences: (i) Pakistan-mediation channel is now structurally civilian-to-civilian back channel bypassing IRGC; (ii) unified Iranian proposal inside Trump's 3-5 day window requires Vahidi to override Pezeshkian OR Pezeshkian to override Vahidi; (iii) Wednesday IRGC kinetic against MSC Francesca retrospectively illuminated as Vahidi using operational facts to silence civilian dissent.

WEDNESDAY IRGC KINETIC OPERATIONALLY BIFURCATING — MSC FRANCESCA SEIZED + AT ANCHOR (CONFIRMED via AIS); EPAMINONDAS TRANSITING BACK + GREEK FM DISPUTES SEIZURE [CONFIRMED on positions; CLAIMED on 'both seized' — reality is bifurcated]. AIS data shows MSC Francesca (Panama-flagged, MSC-operated) at anchor in Iranian waters; Epaminondas (Liberian-flagged, Technomar Shipping Athens manager) transiting back along Iranian waters. Greek FM Giorgos Gerapetritis told CNN Epaminondas 'severely damaged' but NOT seized. Downgrades Wednesday's 'two seized' framing to 'one confirmed seized + one fired-on-and-damaged disputed-as-seized.' IRGC media (Observatorial) claim one of ships was 'Israeli' — structurally false (Panama and Liberia flags, MSC Swiss-Italian, Technomar Greek) but intended to justify seizure to domestic Iranian audiences. UANI April 22: 8 container ships escaped Gulf via Hormuz (industry response: convoy-and-escape). No third IRGC interdiction confirmed Thursday morning IST.

ARAGHCHI THURSDAY MEETING WITH SOUTH KOREAN FM ENVOY — 'AGGRESSORS FULLY RESPONSIBLE FOR HORMUZ INSTABILITY'; 'BLOCKADING IRANIAN PORTS IS AN ACT OF WAR' [CONFIRMED RHETORIC]. Iran's FM Araghchi met South Korean FM envoy Chung Byung-ha Wednesday — operative Thursday. The civilian-government channel continues to articulate the diplomatic register while IRGC-Vahidi camp executes operationally. The civilian-engagement track is now structurally SUBORDINATED to the IRGC operational track per multi-outlet REPORTED Vahidi-camp framing — Araghchi continues messaging but does not control facts on the ground.

VAHIDI 'COUP IN TEHRAN' NARRATIVE CONSOLIDATES — VAHIDI NODE CREATED AT REPORTED [REPORTED on framing; CONFIRMED on procedural fact]. Vahidi personally blocked Pezeshkian's attempt to appoint Hossein Dehghan as Intelligence Minister (Fox, Euronews, American Almanac, Asatunews — multi-outlet relay). Iranian administrative operation runs through 'a military council made up of senior IRGC officers that controls access to the centre of power' (Iran International via multiple relays). Pattern consistent with 1981 Montazeri-era factional contestation. The volume and specificity of independent Western reporting plus procedural evidence (Dehghan block, military council) exceeds REPORTED threshold for node creation even without Iranian-state photographic confirmation. Iranian state has not addressed Vahidi 'in charge' framing — silence consistent with claim but not confirmation. France 24 counter-framing piece argues Trump may overstate fractures for leverage. Vahidi node created with edges: irgc (9.0), iran (8.0), pezeshkian (7.5), mojtaba-khamenei (7.0), strait-of-hormuz (7.5), trump (6.5), united-states (6.5).

MOJTABA KHAMENEI BROKE 42-DAY PUBLIC-SILENCE WITH 'FRACTURE HAS OCCURRED IN THE ENEMY' STATEMENT [CONFIRMED statement with coordinated Press TV/Tasnim/IRNA relay; CLAIMED author-identity]. Published on X Thursday and carried by Press TV and Tasnim Friday. Core content: 'Due to the strange unity created among compatriots, a fracture has occurred in the enemy' — explicitly inverting Trump's 'seriously fractured' framing onto the US side. Statement calls for 'expressing gratitude for this blessing through practical steps' to make 'national unity greater and more steely' and warns 'the enemy's media operations, by targeting the minds and psyches of the people, intend to undermine national unity.' Published AFTER three-branch unity statements Thursday evening (Pezeshkian/Ghalibaf/Mohseni-Ejei); ISW reads Mojtaba's message as acknowledging the three-branch obeisance, 'likely seeks to demonstrate unity and signal an end to the internal competition.' This is the OPPOSITE-DIRECTION outcome the vahidi.json trigger-point file flagged: Vahidi-orchestrated hardline signal rather than de-escalatory unifying intervention. NYT April 23 (via ISW relay): Mojtaba under frequent medical attention, 'heavily reliant on the advice and guidance of senior IRGC commanders led by Vahidi.' Cleanest operational confirmation that 'Mojtaba-silence-then-intervention' framework has been supplanted by 'Vahidi-speaks-through-Mojtaba' architecture. No named source confirmed message is genuinely drafted by Mojtaba vs Vahidi-ghostwritten. (Sources: Press TV, Tasnim, IRNA, NYT, ISW Critical Threats, Business Standard, ANI, Times of Oman, The Tribune)
signals.verification: CONFIRMED statement + coordinated relay. CLAIMED on Vahidi-ghostwriting vs genuine Mojtaba authorship.

signals.content: COORDINATED THREE-BRANCH UNITY MESSAGING + MOJTABA ACKNOWLEDGMENT — ISW 'CHOREOGRAPHED RESPONSE' [CONFIRMED content; REPORTED choreography interpretation]. Thursday evening Iran state-branch heads issued photo-synced coordinated messaging: Ghalibaf (parliament speaker) wrote 'In Iran, there are no radicals or moderates; we are all Iranian and revolutionary, and with the iron unity of the nation and government, with complete obedience to the Supreme Leader of the Revolution, we will make the aggressor criminal regret his actions.' Pezeshkian on X: 'One God, one nation, one leader, and one path.' Mohseni-Ejei (judiciary chief) and Araghchi joined. Press TV editorial frame: 'Collective slap: Heads of Iran's three state branches strike back at Trump.' Mojtaba's 'fracture in the enemy' statement followed several hours later, acknowledging the three-branch obeisance. ISW Critical Threats April 23: 'Iranian leadership appears to reflect a coordinated response shaped by both internal regime politics and external pressure from the United States... choreographed response.' The substantive question — whether Vahidi has relaxed his grip on executive decision-making, or whether this is public unity theater over unchanged private architecture — remains unresolved. Wednesday Pezeshkian-accuses-IRGC X post was NOT withdrawn; unity messaging LAYERED ON TOP rather than replacing it. NYT's Mojtaba-medical-attention + Vahidi-reliance framing suggests architecture has not materially shifted. Tell for whether real or performative: (a) Pezeshkian re-raises Vahidi-blocked-Dehghan-appointment; (b) unified Iranian proposal arrives Islamabad before Trump-window expiry; (c) IRNA retracts or keeps suppression of Wednesday accusation.
signals.verification: CONFIRMED unity-front content. REPORTED 'choreography rather than substance' per ISW.

signals.content: IOC JAYA IRANIAN OIL PURCHASE WAS UNDER 30-DAY US SANCTIONS WAIVER — CLARIFICATION [CONFIRMED correction of yesterday's 'India defiance' framing]. The IOC Jaya 2M-barrel Iranian oil purchase, settled in yuan via ICICI, was executed under a temporary 30-day US sanctions waiver that Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent announced April 15 would NOT be renewed. The Iranian waiver lapsed April 19; the Russian-oil waiver was separately extended to May 16. Bloomberg April 17 primary sourcing: 'Indian refiners settled payments for rare cargoes of Iranian oil purchased under a temporary US sanctions waiver using Chinese yuan through Mumbai-based ICICI Bank.' IOC does not plan further Iranian oil purchases. Materially revises yesterday's brief's 'India operationally diverging from US blockade architecture' framing — India USED a sanctioned window BEFORE it closed; did not defy the blockade. The yuan-ICICI rail re-activation IS the structural datum; 'India-US divergence' is overstated. CENTCOM/Treasury silence is no longer surprising — it was licit under the waiver. (Sources: Bloomberg, Business Standard explainer, Reuters via Investing.com, Atlantic Council, Times of Israel, Globalnews.ca)
